assetPlacementGuidance.expectation: Place editable canvas-app or other app source under app-specific subfolders in `apps/`; keep generated solution bundles out of this root.
Place editable flow source under flow-specific subfolders in `flows/` so repo-local flow artifacts stay separate from solution bundles.
Keep unpacked solution source trees under `solutions/<solution>/`; treat zip files inside `solutions/` as generated or stale output, not canonical source.
Keep repo-local runbooks, provenance notes, and workflow docs under `docs/` so project context stays with the source tree.
Write generated solution zip output to `artifacts/solutions/Core.zip` so packaged artifacts stay outside editable source roots.

contract.bundleLifecycleSummary: The canonical bundle path is artifacts/solutions/Core.zip, but that zip is a generated artifact and may be absent until you pack local source from solutions or export the solution from Dataverse. Typical creation paths are pp solution pack <solution-folder> --out artifacts/solutions/Core.zip or pp solution export Core --environment dev --out artifacts/solutions/Core.zip.
contract.deploymentRouteSummary: pp.config.yaml maps stage dev to environment alias dev and solution Core. The alias resolves later through the external pp environment registry and its auth context. The canonical bundle artifacts/solutions/Core.zip is not generated yet; create it with `pp solution pack <solution-folder> --out artifacts/solutions/Core.zip` or `pp solution export Core --environment dev --out artifacts/solutions/Core.zip`.
contract.environmentAliasProvenance: Stage dev in pp.config.yaml selects environment alias dev. The alias name lives in the project config, but the actual Dataverse URL and auth profile are resolved later from the external pp environment registry.

primaryDataverse.description: Primary Dataverse environment alias for this project

relationships.activeRelationshipSummary: stage dev -> environment dev -> auth profile <missing> -> solution Core (Core)
relationships.authProfileUsageSummary: No auth profile could be resolved from the current project stage mappings.

stageRelationships.summary: stage dev -> environment dev -> auth profile <missing> -> solution Core (Core)

suggestedNextActions: Run `pp env inspect dev --format json` to inspect the external environment registry entry for alias dev.
